summary: Keep the rust-diffforge recorder widget visible after successful dictation and remove voice-activity detection from audio capture.

review_items.summary: After a successful transcription and focused text insertion attempt, the recorder widget returns to ready state and remains visible instead of hiding.

Push-to-talk capture sends the bounded captured audio window directly to local Whisper or cloud transcription without local voice-activity detection thresholds, speech gating, no-speech errors, or VAD diagnostics.

Native push-to-talk capture includes up to 300ms of already-buffered microphone audio before the formal recording start so initial syllables are less likely to be clipped; the pre-roll is included in local Whisper WAV capture and queued into the cloud realtime stream when cloud mode is active.
Audio input stats continue to expose level and buffer timing for UI meters, but no longer report VAD threshold, speech state, speech duration, last speech timing, or noise-floor fields.
No database schema, migration, SQL policy, hosted API, auth, billing, or cross-project contract change is required.

patches.summary: Capture and resample the recorded audio window directly, include a bounded 300ms native pre-roll from the live input buffer, remove local VAD gating/diagnostics, and keep generic focused insertion from hiding the widget.
Keep handsfree focused insertion from hiding the recorder widget after a successful transcript.
Remove VAD constants and fields from shared audio command payloads and define the native capture pre-roll duration.
Remove VAD naming and no-speech UI paths from the recorder and Audio setup surface.
Normalize audio capture stats without VAD-specific fields.
Remove the VAD speech-active meter variant from Audio UI styles.

compatibility.notes: The behavior is local to the desktop app. Existing recorder shortcut handling, local/cloud provider selection, latest-result storage, and focused text insertion commands remain available.

data_handling.sends_audio_to_remote_service: Only when the user selects cloud mode; push-to-talk audio is streamed to Deepgram over the existing realtime WebSocket path.
data_handling.stores_transcripts: The latest transcript remains in local WebView storage for the Audio tab debug panel.
data_handling.diagnostic_logs: Local Whisper audio diagnostics continue to log timings, counts, byte sizes, runtime/model paths, and sanitized errors only; raw audio and transcript text are not logged.

tests.summary: Validate Tauri commands and audio host code.
